# UC-10.17.12 · SonicWall Administrator Login and Configuration Change Audit (SonicWall)

## Description

Firewall admin activity is in scope for virtually every cyber framework. Centralizing it supports insider-threat and break-glass reviews.

## Value

Provides non-repudiation for changes preceding outages or policy weakening.

## Implementation

Forward admin logs with NTP-synced timestamps. Enrich admin username with HR directory.

## SPL

```spl
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)login|admin|config|committed|changed|firmware|user.*add")
| stats count by usr, action, host
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Timeline (admin actions), table (user, action, object).

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
